basic: Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Move your head to change notes and octaves
Pull your favourite emoji for new sounds
Things are definitely more fun with friends
advanced: Change instruments and video effects by posing...
Each expression will result in a different sound
Your job is to make some beautiful music!
Things are definitely more fun with friends
And far more musical and interesting too!
Just be careful, don't get too wild
And be thankful that you don't need VR goggles!
